title.en: A place of retreat for the ancestors.

content.en:
A place of retreat for the ancestors.

At this time, there is not a single living being.

He took a deep breath and began to pound the higher realms with all his body.

The reincarnation source clan is following the path of breaking the boundary of the origin, and he has already broken the boundary nine times, which is already the limit.

As for how to impact the higher realm, the reincarnation source clan has also tried by its predecessors, and with the experience of other races, he also has a little understanding.

If you want to break the shackles of the realm and break through to a higher realm, it is not enough to be strong in the origin, but also to be strong in the physical body and strong in the will of the origin realm, so that you can hope to break through to a higher realm.

So, he has continued to study over the years, and has also created a method that can transform the origin, the body, and the will-Three-Body Technique!

Using the Three-Body Technique, he could transform a part of his origin into the power of the ancestral body and his will in a short period of time, and then impact a higher realm when the time came.

Of course, whether he can break through or not, he doesn't know.

Even, the path he chose to break through was not necessarily right.

It's just that he thinks it's more likely.

Rumble!!!!

The ancestor performed the Three-Body Technique, and swallowed all kinds of incomparably precious and rare resources to make up for the consumption of the original source after performing the Three-Body Technique.

Soon.

His body and mind have become extremely strong, but this is only temporary, and when the time comes, he will be in an extremely weak state.

Then, he took out a secret elixir, which was specially used to break through the bottleneck, and it took countless years to help him reach a higher realm.

After he swallowed it, he began to attack the higher realm.

Outside.

A reincarnation celestial clan's Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord broke into this place and tried to stop the Ancestor.

Thundered!!!

The battle is on!

The powerhouses of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan tried their best to destroy it, but the Reincarnation Source Clan had already prepared for it, so it was a little difficult to destroy the Raccoon Ancestor to impact the higher realm.

And as time passes, the breakthrough of the ancestor is slowly underway.

I don't know how long it has been.

Click!!!!

The shackles in the darkness seem to have been torn apart.

This gave the ancestor a glimmer of hope.

"Could it be that my path is right, I really want to break through to a higher realm????"

Raccoon said excitedly.

The next moment.

His origin began to metamorphose, and it was a change from his essence.

Ten times over!

Hundredfold!

A thousandfold!

A wisp of origin is equivalent to a thousand wisps of origin in the past, and neither the quality nor the power is comparable to the past.

But soon.

The ancestor's face changed drastically, his body was shattering, his will was also shattering, but the origin seemed to be ascending endlessly, and it was beyond his control.

This is an abnormal breakthrough at all!

"I can't control it, I still failed to break through!"

The ancestor smiled bitterly.

He is now similar to the original Origin Ancestor, belonging to a half-step breakthrough, and is about to fall and die.

However, he is not willing to fall like this!

"Reincarnation Supreme Divine Power - Extreme Reincarnation Slash!"

The ancestor gathered his own origin power and aimed at the Void.

And the power of this blow directly broke through one magic circle after another, far surpassing the power of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Bang!!!!

The Endless Void was completely pierced, and the light of the Extreme Reincarnation Slash made all the Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Nine Awakenings and the Origin Upper Realm Overlords who broke the boundaries of the Nine Origins tremble, and they didn't dare to touch the slightest trace of the light, otherwise they would all be erased.

Tear !!!

As if the reincarnation domain had been penetrated, a fragment fell from an unknown place in the reincarnation domain.

And at this time.

The ancestor spied a trace with the power of burning everything.

"I see!"

The ancestor suddenly realized.

Immediately, he waved some of his insights and traces to a Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Reincarnation Origin Clan.

Immediately afterward, his body shattered, and the Origin turned into an ocean that covered the area.

And that fragment attracted the attention of an Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

"What's that?"

Yazu: They also saw this piece.

Although the ancestor broke through in half a step, his strength reached an incomparably terrifying level, and he could kill them in seconds.

But now that the ancestor has fallen, they are naturally not afraid.

And the supreme power of reincarnation of the ancestor slashed to an unknown place and left a fragment, which must be extremely precious.

"Snatch this shard!"

Yazu shouted.

Thundered!!!!

This group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords began to fight for this fragment.

......

"The ancestor really failed to break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

For this result, he still expected it, but after the half-step breakthrough of the ancestor, the strength he showed was really terrifying, far beyond his imagination, even if it was a wisp of breath of that blow, it could kill him many times in seconds.

"From the projection, it seems that a piece of debris has fallen, what is that shard?"

Ye Tian was curious.

But unfortunately, the projection is now turned off, and he has no way of knowing what is going on there.

"Gotta leave!"

Ye Tian left this city, and then annihilated himself against this replica body.

In this way, the reincarnation source clan will not be able to find out anything.

It's been another time.

Ye Tian's Aochen copy body waited quietly for time in the reincarnation ancient mountain.

this day.

Whoa!!

The Nine Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords have returned, and many of them are injured.

......

Reincarnation in the depths of the ancient mountains.

These Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords were healing and communicating at the same time.

"At the cost of injury, I finally snatched a third of that fragment!"

Yazu said.

This is already very good, after all, that fragment is in the territory of the Reincarnation Source Clan, and they are already desperate to be able to snatch a third.

If you're unlucky, don't even try to grab a third of this piece.

"What the hell is this fragment?"

Junzu asked curiously.

"I don't know!" Yazu shook his head, "The Fox Ancestor guy broke through in half a step, and finally seemed to find something, and he desperately slashed in the depths of the reincarnation domain, thus cutting off this fragment, but what he found, I'm afraid that only the reincarnation source clan knows, and they won't tell us." "

"Let's study this fragment first!"

The other nine awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord said.

Immediately, they began to study the fragment.

The other side.

Reincarnation of the source family.

At this time, these Origin Upper Realm Overlords who broke the boundary of the Nine Origin Realms were not in a good mood, after all, the fall of the Reincarnation Origin Ancestor to a strong person also meant that their strength had decreased a little.

What's more, they all received the message transmitted by the ancestor before he died, not only the perception of impacting a higher realm, but also a picture.

It was that image that made them all tremble a little.
